description: Terrible for users. These problems make this product unusable for simple AR functions. The high prices per access should have resulted in faster and more problem-free user experience.We are forced to move to other AR strategies because of lag and problems loading simple objects in AR.

pros: drag and drop of objects, ease of in-line web page loading, location based-tracking.You can visit our public art project at http://rooting-branching.create.fsu.edu/
cons: Users experienced HUGE amounts of lag in loading even small file sized models.Even when the object would load in-frame on devices, the AR function would not work, reported errors, or gave a never-ending blue loading circle in the AR field of view.

review_title: From virtual to reality Echo 3D brings reality to life for me.
description: If you are looking toward the future, open Echo 3D when you get there.
author: Kyeshuan H.
pros: Do you want to tap into a whole new level of realism? If so, follow me on this review about Echo 3D. Let me start by saying if you're looking to bring your ideas and visions to life, let me introduce you to Echo 3D. I was amazed by the lifelike graphics, 3D visuals, and breathtaking landscapes it transformed into something unforgettable. Plus, let's not forget to mention ease of use.
cons: The only downside with Echo 3D is setting your alarm clock because you'll be stuck there for hours and hours.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

author: Shaedil D.
pros: Drag & Drop is a great feature for students because it has a relatively low skill barrier. Content creation is also another feature I liked because it means I can direct students to specific 3D models that they can import. Integrating these features was really simple because every process was well documented.
cons: Echo3D already allows teams to work on projects collaboratively, but there is room for improvement. For example, adding a chat feature or a commenting system within the platform could make communication between team members more efficient.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Easiest to hit the ground with!
author: Induja S.
pros: echo3D is a great tool to help manage assets across platforms. I stumbled upon echo3D while searching for another use case, but echo3D still ended up being a tool i used. What I appreciated most was its simplicity and user-friendly approach. The documentation and examples provided a delightful quickstart, allowing me to set up a sample AR app in under 30 minutes. It was truly amazing that I could access my assets universally without worrying about platform specific integration.
cons: I think the echo3D interface could use a bit more refinement in terms of UI/UX. Otherwise, it was great in terms of functionalities and getting things done.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Ayush S.
pros: Echo3D provides a platform to build and manage 3D assets as a user I don't need to build everything thing from scratch which is one of the best features apart from that in terms of cloud storage it offers high availability and low latency while trying to retrieve information it ensures that it will load fast
cons: There are some cons which I don't like is one of the main reason is cost as we store 3d asset in storage it will charge us expensive as it charges cdn depending on the usage and second reason is security which is one of the key factor as I m Sharing my asset in cloud platform which involves High vulnerability
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: The overall experience with Echo3D was a mixed bag. The use of 3D objects and drag-and-drop feature was impressive. It elevated design projects to a new level, saving time and effort while delivering stunning results. However, the virtual reality feature have room for improvement.
author: Hitesh K.
pros: As a design enthusiast, I recently had the opportunity to try out Echo3D and I am thrilled with the experience! The drag-and-drop feature in Echo3D is incredibly intuitive and user-friendly, making it a breeze to place, and resize 3D objects within my projects. This helps me in achieving stunning results that truly impress my clients and audience.
cons: I had high hopes for Echo3D's virtual reality feature, but unfortunately, my experience was disappointing. The virtual reality functionality in Echo3D felt clunky and lacking in polish. The controls were unintuitive and difficult to use, making it challenging to navigate and interact with the virtual environment effectively.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Your XR Ideas Amplified on echo3D
author: Nino D.
pros: echo3D has a lot of simple step-by-step tutorials online that get you running quickly when it comes to your AR app hosting. The service lets you get around many device storage and application snags that developers tend to run into by hosting an experience with them instead of making you hold everything up at once. As an indie app developer, I've been able to get my ideas up and running faster than any other platform.
cons: The early version was definitely a work in progress with multiple sections of features still in development. Year after year, the developers have smoothed this out.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Nivesh P.
pros: It is easy to use and has friendly UI with the help of drag and drop feature. The cross platform compatibility is one of the key feature. The 3d objects are interactive and can be given simulations and effects. It had good scalability and security features too.
cons: There are some missing customization features, but it depends on the project's scope. The cost is a bit high for small scale developers and startups. It doesn't have a offline feature and has limited integration features.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
